BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The vulnerable SOQL query can be exploited remotely through user-controlled input submitted over the network.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required; injection is possible if untrusted input is concatenated into the query.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: An authenticated user with access to the vulnerable functionality can exploit the issue.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: The attack can be carried out without any additional user interaction.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the Salesforce application and does not cross security boundaries.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Injected queries may expose sensitive records and protected Salesforce data.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Attackers can manipulate query logic to modify or corrupt application data.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Malformed or expensive queries may degrade performance but are unlikely to cause full denial of service.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: SOQL injection techniques are well known and easy to demonstrate.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Salesforce recommends bind variables and escaping methods as official mitigations.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified through static analysis and secure coding standards.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The deployment environment does not reduce exposure to remote attacks.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No additional environmental constraints affect exploitation.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The same level of privileges is required in the target environment.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No user interaction is needed in the deployed environment.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The scope remains within the Salesforce application.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive business and customer data is at risk.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Data integrity is critical in production Salesforce environments.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability impact is secondary compared to data exposure.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Salesforce environments typically store highly sensitive data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity of CRM data is business-critical.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is important but not the primary concern for this issue.
